checks.evidence: game.json includes name, version, description, genres, developer, marketingAssets, entrypoint, and files.
Every file listed in game.json files exists and stays inside the package.
Marketing images are not listed as runtime files.
Required GameSnacks marketing images exist with exact declared dimensions.
Genres use the documented GameSnacks values.
Orientation uses a documented GameSnacks value.
allowOfflineUse is false so the build can use ad monetization.
GameSnacks game lifecycle hooks are present.
GameSnacks ad break and rewarded callbacks are present.
GameSnacks SDK storage is used for score persistence.
GameSnacks audio and score interfaces are used.
Package source avoids browser storage APIs banned by GameSnacks.
Package source has no remote analytics, external API, or network call code.
Package source has no external URLs or outbound links.
GameSnacks package does not include other ad or platform SDK loaders.
First-frame signal is emitted from the game loop.
Ready signal is emitted once the first interactive state is prepared.
GameSnacks ZIP exists and is non-empty.

officialRequirementsCovered: bundle contains game code, marketing assets, and game.json
GameSnacks SDK game, ad, audio, score, and storage interfaces are wired
no external server calls or links
marketing images meet declared minimum dimensions
